task: Bind ASC-0101 production praxis gate into AIOS dispatch so non-trivial work cannot skip MemoryOS, CapabilityOS, GenesisOS, Hive, and specialist assignment.

external_resource_check.reason: This dispatch binding is local deterministic control-plane behavior; no current external API behavior is required.

frictions: Agents skip OS roles when the runtime lets them send production work without a praxis envelope.
The founder should not have to remind agents to use MemoryOS, CapabilityOS, GenesisOS, Hive, plugins, or specialist strengths.
alternative_frames: Dispatch packet as OS-role contract, not just a work ticket

specialist_assignment.job: Implement dispatch --praxis validation and packet enrichment.
Review whether praxis gate placement respects AIOS control-plane boundaries.
May draft envelope text only; cannot accept final work.
